data.name: Portable_ServiceStatus
data.value: Portable mode: running without the RigPilot service. Hardware data is read-only; profiles, automation, and every hardware write are unavailable.

data.name: Portable_SafetySummary
data.value: Portable mode is read-only by design: monitoring runs in this process and no hardware write path exists.

data.name: Portable_UpdateStatus
data.value: Driver updates are unavailable in portable mode.

data.name: Onboarding_Body1
data.value: Start with a read-only inventory of devices, control evidence, user-session bridges, and competing hardware owners. This step cannot change hardware state.

data.name: Onboarding_Body2
data.value: Verified controls have apply, read-back, and reset evidence. Experimental controls require explicit confirmation. Read-only and blocked endpoints remain visible with their exact evidence gap or conflict.

data.name: Onboarding_Body3
data.value: Quiet reduces background power, Efficiency favours useful work per watt, and Performance favours responsiveness without automatic voltage increases. Selection alone never writes hardware.

data.name: Onboarding_Body4
data.value: Capture three read-only telemetry samples so the result has a before-state. Missing sensors are reported as missing instead of being estimated.

data.name: Onboarding_Body5
data.value: The dry run lists the exact action that can be applied and why optional cooling, tuning, or lighting actions are omitted. Commissioning and Advanced Lab steps remain opt-in.

data.name: Onboarding_Body6
data.value: The service prepares the prior state, applies the eligible mode action, reads it back, and commits only after verification. A failed apply enters verified rollback or Recovery Required.

data.name: Onboarding_Body7
data.value: Review the transaction proof. You can independently restore the Windows Balanced default and require a successful default-state read-back before setup is complete.

data.name: Updates_CardBody
data.value: Checks the public GitHub releases page for a newer version. Nothing is downloaded or installed automatically, and the Windows service never touches the network.

data.name: Updates_NotCheckedYet
data.value: No check has run yet this session.

data.name: Updates_Checking
data.value: Checking github.com for the latest release…
